evals.prompt: Find me 5 recent papers on agent-based modeling and put them in a notebook.
evals.expected_behavior: Drive `research-hub auto "agent-based modeling" --max-papers 5` end-to-end: search, ingest into Zotero + Obsidian, bundle + upload + generate brief in NotebookLM.

evals.prompt: Ingest the PDFs in ./papers into a cluster called my-review.
evals.expected_behavior: Run `research-hub import-folder ./papers --cluster my-review`; report how many were ingested and which were skipped as duplicates.
Run `research-hub serve --dashboard`; print the URL `http://127.0.0.1:8765/`; suggest closing it later with Ctrl-C.

evals.prompt: Backfill missing tags and notes on my Zotero items.
evals.expected_behavior: Dry-run first with `research-hub zotero backfill --tags --notes`; surface the report; only run `--apply` after the user confirms.
